# AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT.
title: "Project"
---
Note: To create <code>Project</code> resources, your {{product_name}}
{{iam_name_short}} service account must have
`roles/resourcemanager.projectCreator` on the Google Cloud
organization in which you want to create the project, and the
{{iam_name_short}} service account must belong to a project with the
{{crmapi_name}} enabled.

Note: To link <code>Project</code> resources to {{billing_name}}
accounts, your {{product_name}} {{iam_name_short}} service account
must have `roles/billing.user` on the {{billing_name}} account, and the
{{iam_name_short}} service account must belong to a project with the
{{billing_api}} enabled.

```yaml
billingAccountRef:

  name: string
  namespace: string
folderRef:
  external: string
  name: string
  namespace: string
name: string
organizationRef:
  external: string
  name: string
  namespace: string
resourceID: string
```

    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>billingAccountRef.external</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>

            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>

        </td>

    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>billingAccountRef.name</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>

    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>folderRef</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">object</code></p>
            <p>The folder that this resource belongs to. Changing this forces the resource to be migrated to the newly specified folder. Only one of folderRef or organizationRef may be specified.</p>

    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>folderRef.external</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>The 'name' field of a folder, when not managed by Config Connector. This field must be set when 'name' field is not set.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>folderRef.name</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>The 'name' field of a 'Folder' resource. This field must be set when 'external' field is not set.</p>

    </tr>

        <td>
            <p><code>folderRef.namespace</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>

    </tr>

        <td>
            <p><code>name</code></p>
            <p><i>Required</i></p>

### Status
#### Schema
```yaml
conditions:
- lastTransitionTime: string
  message: string
  reason: string
  status: string
  type: string
number: string
observedGeneration: integer
```

            <p><code class="apitype">object</code></p>

    <tr>

        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Last time the condition transitioned from one status to another.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>conditions[].message</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Human-readable message indicating details about last transition.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td><code>conditions[].reason</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>

        <td><code>conditions[].status</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>

            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>

        <td><code>number</code></td>

            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>The numeric identifier of the project.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>

        <td><code>observedGeneration</code></td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">integer</code></p>
            <p>ObservedGeneration is the generation of the resource that was most recently observed by the Config Connector controller. If this is equal to metadata.generation, then that means that the current reported status reflects the most recent desired state of the resource.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>

</table>

## Sample YAML(s)

### Project In Folder
```yaml
apiVersion: resourcemanager.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: Project
metadata:
  annotations:
    cnrm.cloud.google.com/auto-create-network: "false"
  labels:
    label-one: "value-one"
  name: project-sample-in-folder
spec:
  name: Config Connector Sample
  folderRef:
    # Replace "${FOLDER_ID?}" with the numeric ID of the parent folder
    external: "${FOLDER_ID?}"
```

### Project In Org
```yaml
apiVersion: resourcemanager.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: Project
metadata:
  annotations:
    cnrm.cloud.google.com/auto-create-network: "false"
  labels:
    label-one: "value-one"
  name: project-sample-in-org
spec:
  name: Config Connector Sample
  organizationRef:
    # Replace "${ORG_ID?}" with the numeric ID of the parent organization
    external: "${ORG_ID?}"
```

Note: If you have any trouble with instantiating the resource, refer to <a href="/config-connector/docs/troubleshooting">Troubleshoot Config Connector</a>.
